products.name: IE-SOAR 800
products.descriptor: 800W hydrogen fuel cell module for VTOL and fixed-wing UAVs

evidence.snippet: **IE-SOAR™ 800** is Intelligent Energy’s fuel cell module optimised for VTOL and fixed wing [applications](https://www.intelligent-energy.com/our-industries/uav/). Using our lightweight fuel cell technology and a modular structure, our 800W module offers greater flexibility to the end user and extends time in the air.

*   **1000-hour commercial warranty**
Useful Documentation

products.name: IE-SOAR 1.2
products.descriptor: 1.2kW hydrogen fuel cell module for multi-rotor, fixed-wing, and VTOL UAVs

evidence.snippet: **IE-SOAR™ 1.2** is part of our lightweight product range of hydrogen [fuel cells for drones](https://www.intelligent-energy.com/our-industries/uav/). Our zero-emission fuel cell modules provide a unique solution to extend flight times to drones presently constrained by the limitations of batteries.

Through life power
1200W

products.name: IE-SOAR 2.4
products.descriptor: 2.4kW hydrogen fuel cell module for fixed-wing, rotary-wing, and VTOL UAVs

evidence.snippet: Our **IE-SOAR 2.4** fuel cell modules for drones deliver clean power from [800W](https://www.intelligent-energy.com/our-products/ie-soar-fuel-cells-for-uavs/ie-soar-800w/) up to [2.4kW](https://www.intelligent-energy.com/our-products/ie-soar-fuel-cells-for-uavs/ie-soar-2-4kw/) with the capability of systems working in parallel to reach higher power outputs. This power range allows us to target a wider range of applications such as mapping and LiDAR, to linear inspection and defence.

### Summary product information
Through life power
2400W

products.name: IE-SOAR
products.descriptor: Hydrogen fuel cell module family for UAVs, 800W to 2.4kW

evidence.snippet: Our **IE-SOAR** UAV hydrogen fuel cells deliver clean power from [800W](https://www.intelligent-energy.com/our-products/ie-soar-fuel-cells-for-uavs/ie-soar-800w/) to [2.4kW](https://www.intelligent-energy.com/our-products/ie-soar-fuel-cells-for-uavs/ie-soar-2-4kw/), with the flexibility of integrating modules together to reach higher power outputs. This power range allows us to target the widest range of applications, from mapping and LiDAR to linear inspection and defence.

*   [IE-SOAR 800](https://www.intelligent-energy.com/our-products/ie-soar-fuel-cells-for-uavs/ie-soar-800/)
*   [IE-SOAR 1.2](https://www.intelligent-energy.com/our-products/ie-soar-fuel-cells-for-uavs/ie-soar-1-2/)
*   [IE-SOAR 2.4](https://www.intelligent-energy.com/our-products/ie-soar-fuel-cells-for-uavs/ie-soar-2-4/)

products.name: IE-FLIGHT
products.descriptor: 200kW–multi-MW hydrogen fuel cell system for eVTOL and regional aviation

evidence.snippet: **IE-FLIGHT**™ is our high-power product line for the aviation sector. From 200kW to multi-megawatt scale, these systems have been developed to achieve zero-emission flight for eVTOL, Part-23 and Part-25 aircraft serving sub-regional and regional markets.

From 2019 to 2026 – under the [ATI-funded](https://www.ati.org.uk/) H2GEAR programme – Intelligent Energy have been developing the **IE-FLIGHT™** fuel cell system, offering class-leading current and power densities within an optimised packaging. This built an effective foundation for application in future propulsion or APU applications.

products.name: IE-POWER 4
products.descriptor: 4kW stationary hydrogen PEM fuel cell module for telecoms, micro-grids, and critical infrastructure

evidence.snippet: **IE-POWER™ 4** is Intelligent Energy’s fuel cell module for power generation applications, such as stationary power, micro-grids, telecoms, and critical infrastructure.

**Loughborough, UK – 17 July 2025 –** Intelligent Energy (IE), a UK-based hydrogen fuel cell developer and manufacturer, has achieved third-party North American certification from leading Total Quality Assurance provider [Intertek](https://www.intertek.com/) for its 4kW stationary power product. The [IE-POWER™ 4](https://www.intelligent-energy.com/our-products/ie-power-hydrogen-fuel-cell-module/power-4/) fuel cell product is now a recognised component in the U.S. and Canada with ETL listing (control number 5033795).

products.name: IE-POWER 1T and 1U
products.descriptor: 1kW portable hydrogen PEM fuel cell modules for motive and man-portable applications

evidence.snippet:
IE-POWER 1 fuel cell modules
============================
Intelligent Energy’s 1kW fuel cell modules for motive and man-portable applications

### Summary product information
Through life power
1kW

products.name: IE-LIFT 1
products.descriptor: 1kW hydrogen fuel cell battery-box replacement for 24V material handling equipment

evidence.snippet: Our first product in the range, now available to purchase, is the **IE-LIFT 1**. Designed specifically for 24V MHE equipment and with a minimum width of 210mm, this battery box replacement will fit into some of the narrowest body trucks on the market.

The product delivers 1kW of continuous power, meeting peak loads of up to 7kW through our combined fuel cell battery hybrid solution. The fuel cell module will recharge the battery on the go, meaning there is no need to plug into a charging point.

products.name: IE-LIFT
products.descriptor: Hydrogen fuel cell battery-box replacement family for material handling equipment

evidence.snippet: Our **IE-LIFT™** battery box replacements are specifically designed to power material handling equipment (MHE), replacing the existing battery pack. Using our **IE-POWER** fuel cells at the core, **IE-LIFT** products include integrated hydrogen storage, a battery and a controller in a 210mm wide package.
The full **IE-LIFT** range delivers a zero-emission, practical alternative to traditional battery solutions across the full material handling fleet.

products.name: IE-DRIVE 100
products.descriptor: 110kW hydrogen PEM fuel cell system for passenger cars and light commercial vehicles

evidence.snippet: **IE-DRIVE™ 100** is Intelligent Energy’s high-power hydrogen fuel cell system engineered specifically for passenger cars and light commercial vehicles (LCVs). Delivering peak power of up to **110 kW**, it is packaged in a compact, engine-shaped format that aligns with the spatial and performance demands of modern vehicle platforms.
A hydrogen fuelled PEM fuel cell power unit, with design package for a FWD automotive requirement, ready for multi-sample design validation in small fleet and test conditions.

products.name: IE-DRIVE HD100
products.descriptor: 100kW heavy-duty hydrogen PEM fuel cell system for buses, trucks, and stationary power

evidence.snippet: **IE-DRIVE™ HD100** is Intelligent Energy’s (IE) as a complete heavy duty fuel cell system, engineered to deliver up to 100 kW of continuous zero-emission power. Designed for demanding automotive and industrial applications, it combines high performance with compact packaging and simplified integration

IE-DRIVE HD100 100kW fuel cell systems
======================================
100kW fuel cell system for buses, trucks and stationary power applications

products.name: IE-GRID
products.descriptor: Scalable containerised hydrogen fuel cell system, 100kW to multi-MW, for distributed and backup power

evidence.snippet: **IE-GRID™** is Intelligent Energy’s scalable, high-power, containerised solution designed for distributed power applications. Offering outputs from 100kW to multi-megawatt levels, these containerised zero-emission solutions are powered by our **HD100** fuel cell technology.

A key feature of Intelligent Energy’s PEM fuel cell technology is its modularity. **IE-GRID** leverages the proven **HD100** platform. Our HD100 units can be configured in parallel or series to deliver tailored solutions up to 1MW in a single container, with multiple containers installed to deliver multi-MW power.

unresolved_questions: IE-FLIGHT readiness: the corpus shows an active government-funded development programme (H2GEAR 2019-2026, HEIGHTS 2025) with 'Entry into Service by end of the decade' language — classified as prototype, but a more precise staging (e.g. TRL level) is not disclosed on the product page.

IE-DRIVE 100 readiness: the spec sheet describes it as 'ready for multi-sample design validation in small fleet and test conditions', indicating low-rate production / pre-series validation, not full production.
